# **NZ Construction Website**

# **DOCUMENTATION PLAN – Complete Structure**

## **Hero Section \- Homepage**

### **Headline**

**Building Dreams with Excellence, Precision & Trust**

### **Subheading**

**With over 200 successfully constructed homes and 100+ completed architectural planning, building design, and elevation design projects, we have established ourselves as a trusted and leading construction company in Hyderabad, India.**

### **Call-to-Action Buttons**

- Get Free Consultation
- View Our Projects

### **Statistics Bar**

🏠 **200+ Successfully Constructed Homes**  
 📐 **100+ Architectural Plans, Building Designs & Elevation Design Projects Completed**  
 👨‍💼 **15+ Years of Industry Experience**  
 `⭐` **180+ Happy Clients**

---

# **Navigation Menu**

**Home | Services | Projects | About Us | Contact Us | Login/Register**

---

# **Home Page Sections**

## **1\. Hero Banner**

- Full-width premium construction project image/video
- Company introduction
- CTA buttons

---

## **2\. Company Highlights**

### **Why Choose NZ Construction?**

✔ Experienced Architects & Engineers  
 ✔ End-to-End Construction Solutions  
 ✔ On-Time Project Delivery  
 ✔ Transparent Pricing  
 ✔ Premium Quality Materials  
 ✔ Modern Design Approach

---

## **3\. Our Services**

### **Architectural Floor Plans**

Transform your ideas into professional architectural plans with accurate layouts and space planning.

### **Building Elevation Design**

Modern, contemporary, traditional, and luxury elevation designs tailored to your vision.

### **Construction Services**

Complete residential and commercial construction from foundation to handover.

### **Interior Design**

Functional and aesthetically pleasing interior spaces.

### **Structural Design**

Safe and durable structural planning for residential and commercial projects.

### **Construction Consultation**

Expert guidance for project planning, budgeting, approvals, and execution.

---

## **4\. Featured Projects**

### **Residential Projects**

- Villas
- Duplex Houses
- Apartments

### **Commercial Projects**

- Office Buildings
- Retail Stores
- Warehouses

Each project card includes:

- Project Image
- Project Name
- Location
- Project Description
- Completion Year

Button:  
 **View All Projects**

---

## **5\. Testimonials**

### **Client Reviews**

`⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐ ⭐`

_"NZ Construction delivered our dream home exactly as promised. Professional team and excellent quality."_

---

## **6\. Search Functionality**

Search Bar Placeholder:

**"What are you looking for?"**

Search Categories:

- Services
- Projects
- Pricing Plans
- Articles

---

## **7\. AI Assistant**

Floating chatbot on every page.

Capabilities:

- Service Information
- Pricing Guidance
- Consultation Booking
- Project Inquiry Assistance

Position:

- Bottom Right Corner
- Fixed Floating Button

---

# **Services Page**

---

## **Service 1: Architectural Floor Plans**

### **Description**

Professional floor planning with efficient space utilization and modern architectural standards.

### **Deliverables**

- 2D Floor Plans
- Site Layout Plans
- Room Planning
- Dimensioned Drawings

### **Pricing Plans**

#### **Basic Plan**

₹1,999

Includes:

- Basic Floor Plan
- 2 Revisions

#### **Standard Plan**

₹4,999

Includes:

- Detailed Floor Plan
- Furniture Layout
- 5 Revisions

#### **Premium Plan**

₹9,999

Includes:

- Complete Architectural Package
- Unlimited Revisions
- Consultation Support

---

## **Service 2: Building Elevation Design**

### **Description**

Premium exterior design solutions for residential and commercial projects.

### **Pricing Plans**

#### **Basic**

₹2,999

#### **Standard**

₹6,999

#### **Premium**

₹12,999

---

## **Service 3: Construction Consultation**

### **Pricing Plans**

#### **Online Consultation**

₹999

#### **Site Visit Consultation**

₹2,999

#### **Project Consultation Package**

₹4,999

---

## **Service 4: Structural Design**

### **Pricing Plans**

#### **Residential Structure**

₹5,999

#### **Commercial Structure**

₹14,999

#### **Industrial Structure**

Custom Quote

---

# **About Us Page**

## **Who We Are**

**NZ Construction** is a trusted construction and architectural design company based in Hyderabad, India, delivering high-quality residential and commercial projects with innovation, precision, and commitment.

---

## **Our Mission**

To provide exceptional construction and design solutions that exceed client expectations while maintaining quality, transparency, and professionalism.

---

## **Our Vision**

To become one of India's most trusted construction and architectural design companies.

---

## **Our Achievements**

🏠 200+ Successfully Constructed Homes

📐 100+ Architectural Plans, Building Designs & Elevation Design Projects Completed

`⭐ 180+ Happy Clients`

👨‍💼 15+ Years of Industry Experience

📍 Trusted and Leading Construction Company in Hyderabad, India

---

## **Working Hours**

### **Monday – Friday**

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM

### **Saturday – Sunday**

12:00 PM – 6:00 PM

---

- Full Name
- Phone Number
- Email Address
- Service Required
- Message

 **Request Consultation**

- Name
- Email
- Phone Number
- Password

- Email / Phone
- Password

### **Forgot Password**

# **Wishlist / Favorites**

Users can save:

- Services
- Pricing Plans
- Favorite Projects

---

# **Payment Workflow**

**Home → Services → Select Service → Select Plan → Login/Register → Payment → Confirmation**

Payment Methods:

- UPI
- Credit/Debit Card
- Net Banking
- Wallets
